creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192399
Fixes

Dear maintainer,

Find attached a patch that fixes the rc.d script (%%ETCDIR%% is /usr/local/etc/riemann, so no need to add one more "riemann") and also set a correct default log file location (since your port already creates /var/log/riemann/ with proper permissions).

These changes require a PORTREVISION bump.
